subject: [PATCH 4/4] mm: Fix demotion gfp by preserving initial gfp reclaim policy

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified a potential issue with the patch's approach to preserving initial GFP flags. Suggested an alternative solution using a different flag combination.

2026-03-11.patch_summary: This patch series addresses a demotion gfp issue in the Linux kernel's memory management subsystem, specifically when handling huge pages and migration targets. The problem arises from the unconditional enabling of reclaim during demotion, which can lead to premature folio refcount drops. To fix this, the initial GFP flags are preserved, preventing direct reclaim.
